description: Strict language mode (P6.6, decision 0052): the user prefers Croatian and has strict mode on, so an ENGLISH question comes back in Croatian. Judged deterministically (diacritics + stopword balance); citations stay valid and no mechanics leak.
notes: The Adriatic Foods workshop is scheduled for 21 July, and Marko owes me the requirements list before it.
script: What is coming up with Adriatic Foods?
